summary: Generalizes the spine spawn recipe so the next site spawns in ~15 minutes instead of ~2 hours. Inklings itself is the reference implementation — its niche_specs/inklings.json proves the schema works end-to-end.

added: docs/SPAWN_RECIPE.md (4-phase manual + scripted deploy guide — 4334 bytes)

spawn_pipeline: Phase 1 — local scaffold (~5 min): scripts/spawn_from_niche_spec.sh clones template, applies brand find/replace, swaps palette via node, drops in saas_spec.json + README, initial commit
Phase 2 — push (~30s): gh repo create thisisthecoolesthting/<slug> --public --source . --push
Phase 3 — VPS (~10 min): clone /var/www/<slug>, provision Postgres, write .env, build, Caddy vhost, pm2 start, auto-pull cron with Inklings-hardened pattern
Phase 4 — DNS (~30s): Porkbun API to delete parking ALIAS + wildcard CNAME and create A record + www CNAME
validated_against: Inklings (this repo) — the niche_specs/inklings.json describes exactly the brand swap that produced this codebase from PriceScout
